title: Super Sheep Bombard
description: A legend from dark ages, where sheeps controlled the world...
body:
Minecraft But **SuperSheeps** try to kill you!
The Legend The legend tells about an ancien grimoire, wich tells about an old relic, wich contains a magical scroll about a legend from the hells themselves! In this story, the adults lived underground, holed up like rats. The children played in caves, far from the sun's rays. From an early age, they were taught never to jump! The Super Sheeps could not stand humans jumping. There were dark ages, where sheeps dominated the world with overwhelming military supremacy. Century after century, humanity resisted. Tried to. With humanity on the brink of extinction, the sheep attacks subsided and disappeared altogether. Humans had stopped jumping. DNA modified their legs, preventing jumps. And eventually, the legend has been lost in time. But in the 20th century, a man found the damned grimoire. In disbelief, he tried to jump. But faced with the immense difficulty of bending his legs, he trained day and night to achieve it. If humans could jump, he had to prove it! And finaly, it happened. The impossible. The unthinkable. **He jumped.** He had discovered the ruthless legend of the Super Sheeps, and proved it was real, using science and its own legs. Now he knew the truth, he had to show the world a human could jump! But in the depths of space, an unfathomable power has awakened. Disturbed by the shock waves of his jumps, transcending space. It was furious. It was coming. And it wanted him dead! Congratulations. You're the guy.
## Main features - Spawn a sheep above your head each time you jump - Makes you love slabs - Meet Super, Giga and Turbo sheep on your journey - Display a lot of particules to add some lags ## Pro tips - Don't jump - Don't die

Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
Mod Version Mod packaging is designed to be more convenient for your installations. Executed on the server side, it does not need to be installed on the client side. Keep in mind that inside the mod is simply a datapack. In addition, interactions between too many mods can degrade the functioning of one or more mods.
